name: Balaji Selvaraj
title: Technical AI Leader
headline: Hands-on Technical AI Lead with experience spanning product, services, and startup environments.

heroQuote.translation: Let all your thoughts be lofty.
heroQuote.author: திருவள்ளுவர் • Thiruvalluvar
heroQuote.imageAlt: Statue of the Tamil poet-philosopher Thiruvalluvar

credentialHook: Kaggle top 0.3% globally · 652 among 200K+ data scientists

leadershipPhilosophy.intro: I lead AI the way a CTO does: secure the sponsorship and set the strategy before the first model exists, then build the platform, the team, and the guardrails that turn conviction into shipped, regulated value. My edge is a rare bridge — a biomedical engineer who supported 400+ surgeries across 5 specialties and now architects production AI — so the science, the business case, and the system stay one conversation.

strategicVision.title: Sell first, build next
strategicVision.description: Secure executive sponsorship and align portfolios before data or infrastructure exist — turning an ambiguous 5-direction landscape into 2 funded, company-scale programs.

strategicVision.title: Executive influence, VP to EVP
strategicVision.description: Influence spanning VP → SVP → Chief Scientist → EVP, translating independently sourced AI ideas into sponsored, company-scale mandates.

strategicVision.title: Positioned across the org
strategicVision.description: Placed the AI team across 7 internal groups and 3 external startups with zero conflicting priorities, and aligned delivery to 3 corporate R&D scorecards (Oncology, BioPharma R&D, CPSS) over 3 cycles.

strategicVision.title: Authored the 2030 roadmap
strategicVision.description: Wrote the 2030 Gene & Cell Therapy multimodal-AI roadmap the company took to Gartner — a bottom-up vision that became an official strategic artifact.

businessImpact.title: $20–50M projected annual savings
businessImpact.description: Business case for the flagship drug-safety AI platform — the number that anchored executive funding.

businessImpact.title: 5 years → 3 years
businessImpact.description: Compressed drug-safety study timelines by two years, converting model performance into regulated program speed.

businessImpact.title: $40K/yr + $3K/month recovered
businessImpact.description: Restructured tooling to recover $40K/yr in licensing and $3K/month in idle GPU spend, with cost treated as a design constraint.

businessImpact.title: ~6 months capacity freed
businessImpact.description: Deciding what NOT to build: retired low-probability work to free roughly six months of delivery capacity for funded, high-conviction programs.

platform.title: The internal AI platform the org ships on
platform.description: Built a reusable foundation-model framework standardizing training, inference, and evaluation across 3 modalities and 3 internal infrastructures.

platform.title: GxP-compliant production AI
platform.description: First on the team to deploy AWS SageMaker training and Lambda inference inside AstraZeneca's GxP-compliant AI-Bench — establishing the regulated path others build on.

platform.title: Distributed training at scale
platform.description: FSDP/DeepSpeed with spot-instance checkpointing, engineered so large-model training runs with cost as a first-class design constraint.

peopleMentoring.title: Scaled 1 → 12 across 5 countries
peopleMentoring.description: Grew the team from a single engineer to 12 across India (6), UK (2), Sweden (2), Mexico (1), and China (1).

peopleMentoring.title: Career mentoring
peopleMentoring.description: Mentored AI/ML engineers (3) and graduate trainees (10) into full-time industry/research roles.

peopleMentoring.title: Kaggle coaching
peopleMentoring.description: Mentored a team of junior engineers (3) to secure a Kaggle Bronze (Top 6%, 76th/1,220).

peopleMentoring.title: Hackathon mentoring
peopleMentoring.description: Mentored a student team (4) to Top 4 nationally, Smart India Hackathon (2019).

governance.title: Human-in-the-loop guardrails
governance.description: Designed human-in-the-loop controls in sandboxed, isolated VPCs (NemoClaw) so generative AI runs with review and containment by default.

governance.title: GxP-compliant AI delivery
governance.description: Shipped AI inside regulated GxP boundaries, making compliance a build-time property rather than a release-time audit.

governance.title: Risk as a design constraint
governance.description: Treat AI safety, compliance, and regulatory risk as first-class design constraints — engineered in from the first architecture decision.

vision.heading: Multimodal AI at the edge of biology
paragraphs: Shaped an innovative multimodal AI vision aligned with AstraZeneca's 2030 Gene & Cell Therapy ambitions — a vision independently developed bottom-up and later submitted to Gartner by GITC Chennai.

The philosophy: integrate heterogeneous biological signals — omics, imaging, molecular, single-cell — into unified learned representations that generalize across compounds, diseases, and data sources.
Currently architecting AI systems where model-agnostic platforms can adapt to new modalities, cross-assay contexts, and heterogeneous vendor data without re-engineering from scratch.

collaborations.detail: Dr. Shantanu Singh (Senior Group Leader): co-developing Cell Painting & omics computational pipelines
Research collaboration to co-develop cutting-edge AI models and computational pipelines
Neuron connectivity toolbox delivery to Dr. Partha Mitra

contactIntro: Open to discussing AI leadership opportunities, research collaborations, and advisory roles.

contactPage.title: Let's build something important
